channel.title: Java on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Pi Stack

item.title: Drools vs OpenL Tablets vs Easy Rules: Self-Hosted Business Rules Engine Guide 2026
item.description: Business logic buried inside application code is one of the most common sources of technical debt. When pricing rules, compliance checks, eligibility criteria, or routing decisions are hardcoded, every change requires a full development cycle — code, test, build, deploy.
